name: Batch rename files to kebab-case
prompt: Rename all files in the messy_files/ directory to kebab-case: lowercase everything, replace spaces, underscores, parentheses, brackets, and other special characters with hyphens, collapse consecutive hyphens into one, and remove leading/trailing hyphens from the name (keep the extension). For example: "Summary (Draft).txt" becomes "summary-draft.txt", "metrics[v3].csv" becomes "metrics-v3.csv". After renaming, produce rename_log.json in the current directory: an object mapping each original filename to its new filename.

criteria.testPattern: rename_log.json exists|has all 12 mappings|maps old names to new

criteria.description: All files correctly renamed on disk

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
